expected_results: A LOSS trade through the generic path (ingest_trade_result) creates NO WIMS ConsumptionContract and returns (envelope, None); its internal audit (TRADE_DETECTED, ENVELOPE_CREATED) is preserved and ENVELOPE_DELIVERED/CONSUMED are NOT recorded.
A BREAKEVEN (net-zero) trade creates NO WIMS ConsumptionContract.
deliver_trade_result refuses a non-winning envelope (net pnl <= 0) with ValueError even on a direct call.
The WIN path is intact: a winning trade still creates a TRADE_RESULT ConsumptionContract with result_type=WIN and its full audit trail.
No execution/order/trading behaviour changes; the diff touches only the intelligence content path.
deliver_trade_result is the sole in-scope creator of a TRADE_RESULT contract in the automatic trade-result path (verified by grep).
Full backend suite green; secret-scan + governance pass.
actual_results: intelligence tests: Ran 33 tests OK (incl. 4 new).
test_loss_creates_no_wims_contract_but_keeps_internal_audit: PASS (contract None, 0 ConsumptionContract, TRADE_DETECTED + ENVELOPE_CREATED present, ENVELOPE_DELIVERED + ENVELOPE_CONSUMED absent).
test_win_path_still_creates_contract: PASS (contract present, result_type WIN); existing test_ingest_creates_trade_result_contract_and_audits still PASS (CLOSED_TRADE is a WIN).
Full backend suite: Ran 439 tests OK.

Completeness scan: intelligence/delivery.py:185 (deliver_trade_result) is the only TRADE_RESULT contract creator in the automatic path; wp2_demo/wp3_demo are WIMS demonstration commands (fixture payloads), out of scope.
make secret-scan OK; governance-check OK; EVIDENCE-LINT PASS.
Boundary: diff touches only backend/intelligence/{delivery.py, management/commands/produce_trade_result.py, tests.py} — no execution/, no order path, no trading behaviour change.
limitations: Repo-only — no Telegram send, no WIMS publish execution, no deploy, no provider arming, no auto-demo/live, no E3, no order_send, no real trade.
Internal analytics for losers/breakeven are preserved (the immutable envelope + TRADE_DETECTED/ENVELOPE_CREATED audit); only the WIMS ConsumptionContract / public-story delivery is withheld.

Scope is the automatic intelligence trade-result path (ingest_trade_result → deliver_trade_result). The wp2_demo/wp3_demo WIMS demonstration commands create TRADE_RESULT contracts from fixed fixture payloads via services.create_contract directly and are operator-run demo tooling — not the generic delivery path — so they are intentionally out of scope.
The NotificationCandidate / outcome_router chain (execution app) already routes WIN-only; this packet only closes the older intelligence-side gap.
